title: DCShadow Rogue Domain Controller Registration
description: Detects DCShadow, where mimikatz registers a rogue Domain Controller (lsadump::dcshadow) to push malicious directory replication (e.g. SID History or AdminSDHolder changes) while bypassing normal change logging.
query: ('Log Source' = 'Windows Sysmon Events' or 'Log Source' = 'Windows Sysmon Operational Logs' or 'Log Source' = 'SOC Windows Sysmon Logs') and ((('Command Line' like '*lsadump::dcshadow*' or 'Command Line' like '*dcshadow*' or 'Command Line' like '*/push*')) and (('Command Line' like '*/object:*' or 'Command Line' like '*/attribute:*')))
falsepositives: None expected; DCShadow has no legitimate use
